description: Victims are deceived into sharing One-Time Passwords (OTPs) or authentication codes, enabling unauthorized access to bank accounts or digital payment services.
recommended_actions: Stop all communication with the suspected fraudster.
Never share OTPs or authentication codes with anyone.
Immediately contact your bank or payment service provider.
Report the incident by calling 1930 as soon as possible.
Preserve all messages, screenshots, call logs and transaction details.

rules.name: Direct OTP Request
rules.explanation: The message directly asks the victim to reveal an OTP or authentication code.
examples: Share your OTP to complete KYC.
Tell me the verification code you received.

rules.name: Bank Verification Pretext
rules.explanation: The message claims that an OTP is required for account verification.
examples: Verify your bank account by sharing the OTP.
Complete account verification using the OTP sent to your phone.

rules.name: KYC Update Request
rules.explanation: The message uses KYC updates as a reason to obtain an OTP.
examples: Your KYC has expired. Share the OTP to update it.
Complete KYC verification using the OTP.

rules.name: Account Suspension Threat
rules.explanation: Creates urgency by threatening account suspension unless the OTP is shared.
examples: Your account will be blocked unless you share the OTP.
Immediate verification required to avoid account suspension.

rules.name: Reward or Cashback Claim
rules.explanation: Promises rewards or cashback while requesting OTP verification.
examples: Claim your cashback by sharing the OTP.
Your reward is ready. Verify using the OTP.

rules.name: Refund Processing
rules.explanation: Pretends to process a refund and asks for an OTP.
examples: Share the OTP to receive your refund.
Refund verification pending. Tell us the OTP.

rules.name: Customer Support Impersonation
rules.explanation: Impersonates legitimate support personnel to gain trust before requesting an OTP.
examples: I am calling from your bank. Please share the OTP.
Our technical support team needs the OTP to resolve the issue.

rules.name: Urgency and Time Pressure
rules.explanation: Uses urgency to pressure the victim into revealing an OTP without verification.
examples: Act now! Share the OTP within 5 minutes.
The verification expires today. Send the OTP immediately.
